title: Gluten-Free Frankfurter Delight
description: A sweet and indulgent Egyptian dish featuring gluten-free frankfurters cooked by steam for a fluffy texture.

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds or Chopped Almonds (optional for garnish)

instructions: Preheat a small steamer pot over medium heat.
Prepare the frankfurter patties by dusting them with all-purpose gluten-free flour blend.
In a large bowl, mix together applesauce, honey or maple syrup, vanilla extract, and coconut milk powder until smooth. Mix in ground cinnamon.
Steam the prepared frankfurter patties in the steamer pot for about 2-3 minutes per side until they puff up and are lightly browned on both sides.
Once done, transfer them to a serving plate or small bowl lined with paper towels to absorb any excess moisture.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds or chopped almonds if desired, then drizzle remaining syrup over the top for an extra indulgent touch.
